name: Graph-Constrained Policy Learning for Extreme Clinical Code Prediction
summary: arXiv:2607.11954v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Clinical code prediction maps unstructured discharge summaries to ICD-10-CM leaf codes in a large, sparse, and deeply hierarchical label space. Mos...
description: arXiv:2607.11954v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Clinical code prediction maps unstructured discharge summaries to ICD-10-CM leaf codes in a large, sparse, and deeply hierarchical label space. Most systems treat the task as flat multi-label classification, scoring codes independently and providing limited training signal for rare labels. We propose a graph-constrained traversal policy that for...
author: Amritpal Singh, Sebastian Torres, Khawar Shakeel, Syed Ahmad Chan Bukhari
